title: Cherry
description: Transforms Netherite and Dark Oak into Cherry!
body:
# Cherry ## Textures This texture pack transforms Netherite tools and blocks and Dark Oak blocks and utilities into Cherry ones! Here's what changes:
### Blocks - Ancient Debris - Dark Oak Door - Dark Oak Trapdoor - Dark Oak Log - Dark Oak Planks - Dark Oak Leaves - Dark Oak Sapling - Dark Oak Sign - Dark Oak Hanging Sign - Netherite Block ### Items - Dark Oak Boat - Dark Oak Chest Boat - Netherite Scrap - Netherite Ingot - Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template - Totem of Undying - Netherite Sword - Netherite Axe - Netherite Pickaxe - Netherite Shovel - Netherite Hoe - Shield ### Armor - Netherite Helmet - Netherite Chestplate - Netherite Leggings - Netherite Boots **That's all of it. Hope you like this texture pack!** ## Want more? Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/aYBuhfGxBb) if you want to ask for more texture packs!
